description: baseline: pure PyTorch CPU ops (torch 2.4, 16 threads)
frozen weights (skip weight grads in backward)
torch.compile aot_eager (slower, graph breaks on C++ kernels)
C++ ATen fused edgewise inner (same speed as Python ATen)
fused SO2 conv with pre-allocated output (copy_ overhead)
custom autograd SO2 conv (extra mm overhead in backward)
pre-transposed linear weights (MKL handles T flag natively)
